name: Yokai Survivor
short_description: Yokai Survivor is a single-player survivor-like auto-shooter. Face relentless waves of twisted yokai in a cursed underworld, harvest precious fruits, and master powerful ninjutsu skills to turn the tide. It's one ninja against the underworld!
detailed_description:
Yokai Survivor is a single-player survivor-like auto-shooter. Face relentless waves of twisted yokai in a cursed underworld, harvest precious fruits, and master powerful ninjutsu skills to turn the tide. Grow stronger with each run, unlock deadly abilities, and carve your path through the darkness. It’s one ninja against a world of nightmares — how long can you survive?

🔥 Key Features

  • ⚔️ Survive Relentless Yokai Hordes:
    Face chaotic, fast-paced battles against swarms of supernatural enemies.

  • 🥷 Master Deadly Ninjutsus:
    Unlock and upgrade a diverse arsenal of ninjutsu abilities, combining them for devastating combos.

  • ⛏️ Harvest & Progress:
    Collect materials during runs to invest in permanent upgrades and traits, enhancing future attempts.

  • 🌌 Endless Procedurally Generated Nightmares:
    Each session offers a unique challenge with randomized enemy waves and arena layouts.

  • 📈 Meta-Progression That Sticks:
    Persistent progression system allowing players to grow stronger over time and tailor their playstyle.
